_comment: Chat-grounding eval: natural-language questions with expected doc-path substrings. Measures whether chat retrieval (blend + withText + K) surfaces the right page in the grounding sources. Run: npm run chat-eval. A case is a hit when any top source path contains any `expect` substring. Grow this from real ChatLog questions as traffic arrives.
